Delayed report after a storm survey was conducted. A brief tornado occured southwest of Stockbridge, Michigan on Wednesday, July 26th from aboiut 239 pm to 243 pm. Damage path was about 1.5 miles long and 150 yards wide. The tornado caused minor roof damage and damage from trees falling on homes. Several dozen large trees were uprooted along the path.
Reports of trees and wires down in Hanover, Liberty, and Columbia Townships.

Delayed report after a storm survey was conducted. A brief tornado occured southeast of Stockbridge, Michigan on Wednesday, July 26th from aboiut 247 pm to 251 pm. Damage path was about 2 miles long and 50 to 100 yards wide. The tornado caused intermittent damage to trees and crops as well as roof and siding damage to an outbuilding. Maximum wind speed estimated at 70 mph.
